zh.lifeSummary: 當William of Brereton於大約1265年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，他的父親William of Brereton23歲，母親Cicelie Sandbach17歲。他與Rohese de Vernon在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年之後在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William of Brereton于大约1265年出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可时，他的父亲William of Brereton23岁，母亲Cicelie Sandbach17岁。他与Rohese de Vernon在英国爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William of Brereton was born about 1265, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, his father, William of Brereton, was 23 and his mother, Cicelie Sandbach, was 17. He married Rohese de Vernon in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1327, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William of Brereton est né environ 1265, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William of Brereton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Cicelie Sandbach, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Rohese de Vernon à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1327, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William of Brereton um 1265 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William of Brereton 23 und seine Mutter Cicelie Sandbach 17. Er hat in Cheshire, England Rohese de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1327 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William of Brereton è nato il circa 1265 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William of Brereton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Cicelie Sandbach, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Rohese de Vernon nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1327, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: William of Breretonが約1265年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父William of Breretonは23歳，母Cicelie Sandbachは17歳であった。イギリスチェシュアイアでRohese de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William of Brereton(이)가 대략 1265년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William of Brereton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicelie Sandbach(은)는 17세였다. 그는 영국 체실르에서 Rohese de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William of Brereton nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William of Brereton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Cicelie Sandbach, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Rohese de Vernon em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1327, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William of Brereton родился около 1265 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William of Brereton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Cicelie Sandbach, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohese de Vernon в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1327 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William of Brereton nació aproximadamente 1265, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William of Brereton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Cicelie Sandbach, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Rohese de Vernon en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1327, en Inglaterra.
